hero.title: KrishiCarbon AI
hero.subtitle: Real-time carbon tracking, climate risk alerts, and verified soil intelligence — built for every Indian farmer.
feature.emissions.title: IPCC-Grade Emission Ledger
feature.emissions.desc: Calculate and log N₂O and CO₂e emissions from fertilizers and crop residue burning using internationally certified IPCC Tier 1 formulas.
feature.ai.title: AI Soil Verification
feature.ai.desc: Upload soil lab reports or speak in Hindi/Gujarati — Gemini AI extracts structured carbon data instantly.
feature.hub.title: Local Transition Hub
feature.hub.desc: Find nearby organic fertilizer suppliers, solar pump dealers, and low-carbon transition support — geolocated to your farm.
dashboard.title: Farm Carbon Dashboard
warning.reversal_detail: Intense heatwaves are accelerating soil organic carbon depletion. Deploy immediate organic mulching or moisture mitigation.
warning.heat_threshold: Temperature exceeds 38°C with low topsoil moisture for 3+ consecutive days.
ledger.title: Emission History Ledger
ledger.no_records: No emission records yet. Log your first entry below.
emission.title: Log New Emission Entry
verify.title: Soil & Voice Verification
verify.upload_label: Drop soil lab report here (JPG, PNG, PDF)
verify.voice_hint: Try: 'आज मैंने दो बोरी यूरिया डाला' or speak in Gujarati
hub.title: Local Transition Hub
hub.no_results: No suppliers found nearby. Try expanding search radius.

insights.title: Reduce Your Carbon Footprint
insights.subtitle: Personalised suggestions based on your farm data, grounded in IPCC guidelines. Each recommendation includes estimated CO₂e savings.
insights.suggestions.title: Personalised Suggestions
insights.awareness.title: Did You Know?
insights.awareness.subtitle: Carbon footprint facts for farmers
insights.fact.1: of global greenhouse gas emissions come from agriculture
insights.fact.2: more potent than CO₂ — that's the global warming impact of N₂O from fertilizers
insights.fact.3: CO₂e released by burning just 1 tonne of wheat stubble
insights.fact.4: of healthy farmland can sequester up to 600 kg CO₂ per year through good soil practices
insights.fact.5: per tonne CO₂e is the current voluntary carbon market price accessible to farmers
insights.fact.6: planted on a 1-hectare farm border absorb the equivalent of burning 1 bag of urea
insights.market.title: Your Carbon Data Has Value
insights.market.body: Every emission entry you log in KrishiCarbon AI is part of an immutable, timestamped ledger. This is the foundation for accessing voluntary carbon markets. When you reduce emissions using these suggestions, the difference between your baseline and new readings is your carbon reduction credit.
insights.market.source: Source: Gold Standard, Verra VCS, India Carbon Market guidelines
